auth.loginSubtitle: Continue building healthier habits with Alex.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your profile and get guidance tailored to you.
auth.heroDescription: Understand your meals, build healthier habits, and receive practical guidance adapted to your lifestyle.
auth.feature1Text: Capture food and receive useful nutritional context.
auth.feature2Text: Turn everyday choices into sustainable progress.
auth.feature3Text: Recommendations adapted to your goals and routine.
auth.privateByDesign: Private by design · Built for everyday progress
auth.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
auth.passwordRequirements: Your password must contain at least 8 characters.
auth.acceptTerms: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.acceptTermsError: Please accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.registerError: We could not create your account. Please review your details and try again.
auth.resetDescription: Enter your account email and we will send reset instructions if the account exists.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, reset instructions are on the way.
auth.resetUnavailable: Password reset is not enabled by the current API yet.
auth.resetError: We could not process the request. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is your daily nutrition command center.
dashboard.missionText: Build one balanced plate and log your water before lunch.
dashboard.alexMessage: Your morning is light on protein. A Greek yogurt or eggs would make the rest of the day easier.
dashboard.demoNote: Sample dashboard data for QA preview
